<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project: React-based e-commerce platform for sewing machine customization (SanMayMac)

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Scaffolded using Vite with React template. Directory structure created following feature-based architecture.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Created comprehensive folder structure with:
	- Feature-based organization (auth, bidding, design-studio, finance, products, users)
	- Role-based layouts (Customer, Workshop, Admin, Auth)
	- Global state management with Zustand (auth, cart stores)
	- API service layer with Axios
	- Custom hooks (useDebounce, useWindowSize, useFetch)
	- Utility functions (currency formatting, validation, text manipulation)
	- Protected routes with role-based access control
	- Basic placeholder components (Button, LoadingSpinner)
	- Example pages for each role (Customer Home, Workshop Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, Login)

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required. Project uses standard npm packages.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Build completed successfully. Production build size:
	- HTML: 0.49 kB (gzip: 0.32 kB)
	- CSS: 12.21 kB (gzip: 3.21 kB)
	- JS: 176.85 kB (gzip: 56.92 kB)
	No build errors or warnings.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Development task configuration ready via `npm run dev` command.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Project is ready to run with `npm run dev` command.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with comprehensive project documentation.
	All HTML comments removed from this file.
